title: Season-scope the points table calculation
description: The points table query in getCompletedMatchupsWithPlayers() has no season filter — it pulls finished matchups from ALL seasons. When a second season starts, last season's results will bleed into the current points table. Fix this by adding f.season_id = ? to the main matchup query and the halved-fixture exclusion subquery. Also scope the player list to only load players on teams in the active season (via player_teams), so departed players naturally drop out of the current table.
acceptance_criteria: getCompletedMatchupsWithPlayers() filters by active season ID
Halved-fixture exclusion subquery also filters by active season ID
calculatePlayerPoints() loads only players on teams for the active season
Points table shows correct results when multiple seasons exist in database
Previous season's matchups do NOT appear in current season's points table
Players who played last season but are not on a team this season do NOT appear
Division 4 rule (18-match cap) applies per season, not across seasons
Rescheduled fixtures header still works correctly with season filter

key_queries_to_fix: Halved-fixture subquery at ~line 216: add WHERE f2.season_id = ?
calculatePlayerPoints() at ~line 115: replace GetPlayers() with season-scoped player query
approach: 1. Get active season ID at the start of calculatePlayerPoints()
2. Replace h.service.GetPlayers() with a query that joins players → player_teams WHERE season_id = active
3. Pass season ID into getCompletedMatchupsWithPlayers(ctx, seasonID)
4. Add f.season_id = ? to main matchup query WHERE clause
5. Add f2.season_id = ? to the halved-fixture exclusion subquery
6. Verify getCurrentWeekNumber() and getRescheduledWeekHeader() are also season-scoped
7. Verify applyDivision4Rule() works correctly with season-scoped data

testing_requirements: E2E: Points table shows only current season results after seeding two seasons of data
E2E: Player who played in season 1 but is not on a team in season 2 does not appear on season 2 points table
E2E: Player who played in both seasons shows only current season points
E2E: Halved fixture exclusion works correctly within a single season
E2E: Division 4 rule caps at 18 matches within the current season only
E2E: Points table is empty at the start of a new season with no completed fixtures
Integration test: getCompletedMatchupsWithPlayers returns only active-season matchups
Integration test: calculatePlayerPoints returns empty lists when no fixtures completed in active season

context.user_story: As a league administrator, I need the points table to show only the current season's results so that standings are accurate when we start a new season
context.bug_detail: Currently the query at points.go:209 has no season_id filter. The only season-aware code in points.go is isActiveSeasonCompleted() which checks fixture completion, not which matchups to count.
